content.speakerText: So, after this, you'll meet your team at 10:30, then IT will walk you through the system.
content.speakerTextCn: 接下来10:30见团队，之后IT会教你用系统。

options.text: Is the IT session at 11? I want to make sure I’m not late.
I don’t need the IT session, I already know the system.
Can we move the team meeting to 11?

content.explanation: 正确答案是主动确认时间，避免误解，符合场景中‘确认日程’的核心目的。干扰项2是拒绝服务，不符合职场积极态度；干扰项3是要求改时间，过于主动且无必要；干扰项4是简单回应，未确认关键信息，缺乏主动性。

content.speakerText: Lunch is at 12, and we'll do a quick office tour after that.
content.speakerTextCn: 中午12点吃午饭，之后我们会简单逛一下办公室。

options.text: Is there a designated area for lunch? I want to know where to go.
I prefer to eat at my desk, can I skip the lunch break?
What time does the office tour end?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了对细节的主动询问，符合‘体现主动适应态度’的要求。干扰项2是拒绝公司安排，不符合职场礼仪；干扰项3虽合理，但问题焦点应是午餐地点而非 tour 结束时间；干扰项4是敷衍回应，未体现主动性。

content.speakerText: Your training starts tomorrow at 9 a.m. in Room 302. Don’t forget to bring your ID and laptop.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的培训明天上午9点在302室开始，请记得带上身份证和笔记本电脑。

options.text: Could you confirm if the training is still in Room 302? I want to be sure.
I’ll bring my phone instead of a laptop.
Can I start at 10 instead? I have another meeting.

content.explanation: 正确答案是确认关键信息（地点），符合‘确认日程’场景的核心技能。干扰项2是替换必需物品，不专业；干扰项3是要求改时间，不合时宜；干扰项4是简单回应，未确认关键细节。

content.template: Wait, is the IT session at 10:30 or ___? I want to be on time.
content.hint: 这是在确认IT培训的具体时间，避免与团队会议混淆
content.knowledgePoint: 时间确认表达（数字对比）

content.template: Is there a ___ nearby? I'm not sure where to go for lunch.
content.hint: 公司内常见的用餐场所，用于询问午餐地点

content.template: Could you please confirm the ___ for the office tour after lunch?
content.hint: 在确认日程时，常需确认活动的哪个关键信息？
content.knowledgePoint: 日程确认核心要素：time（时间）

content.speakerText: So, after this, you'll meet your team at 10:30, then IT will walk you through the system.
content.speakerTextCn: 接下来10:30见团队，之后IT会教你用系统。
expectedAnswers: Wait, is the IT session at 10:30 or 11? I want to make sure I don’t miss it.
Just to confirm — team at 10:30, then IT right after?
Thanks for the schedule! So IT follows the team meeting — is that correct?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认了IT培训时间，避免歧义
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌清晰
关键词覆盖：使用了‘IT session’、‘confirm’、‘on time’等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Lunch is at 12, and we'll do a quick office tour after that.
content.speakerTextCn: 中午12点吃午饭，之后我们会简单逛一下办公室。
expectedAnswers: Is there a cafeteria nearby? I’d like to know where to head after lunch.
Will the office tour start right after lunch, or is there a break?
Sounds good! Could you let me know how long the tour usually takes?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动询问与午餐或参观相关的实用细节
语言准确性：使用了恰当的疑问句结构和礼貌表达
表达自然度：符合新员工适应环境的积极语气
关键词覆盖：使用了‘cafeteria’、‘tour’、‘after lunch’等场景词汇

content.speakerText: Your training starts tomorrow at 9 a.m. in Room 302. Don’t forget to bring your ID and laptop.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的培训明天上午9点在302室开始，请记得带上身份证和笔记本电脑。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! Could you confirm if Room 302 is on the third floor?
I’ll bring both items — is there Wi-Fi available in the room?
Just to double-check: 9 a.m. in Room 302, and I need my ID and laptop. Got it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认了地点、物品或额外细节，避免遗漏
语言准确性：使用了‘confirm’、‘double-check’、‘bring’等准确动词
表达自然度：语气礼貌、清晰，体现主动和负责的态度
关键词覆盖：使用了‘training’、‘Room 302’、‘ID’、‘laptop’等核心词汇
